title: Add Attribution section to dashboard: calibration curve, edge scatter, hit-rate table, trade-class breakdown
objective: Surface attribution data on the dashboard so the operator can answer calibration and edge-attribution questions in ≤ 10 seconds. All data must come from trades_sports.db only.
forbidden_actions: Modify bot_core, paper_exec, risk, or model code
required_work: 1. Add GET /api/attribution/summary endpoint (calibration, trade_classes, brier, log_loss).
3. Add Attribution section to the authoritative dashboard HTML with 4 panels.
4. All reads sourced from trades_sports.db only — no in-memory fallback.
5. Panels include n, since-cutoff, low-sample visual cue.
acceptance_criteria: Two new /api/attribution/* endpoints exist and return the documented JSON shape
Four new panels render in the authoritative dashboard file
Every panel reads from trades_sports.db only (grep proof in result)
Low-sample (n<20) buckets render muted with tooltip
verification: curl GET both endpoints, paste example JSON in result
Open dashboard, screenshot or describe each panel rendered
Show SELECT statements used and confirm source is trades_sports.db
Confirm at least one panel shows a low-sample muted bucket OR confirm data has enough volume everywhere
